name: Bobby Sanabria
abstract: Bobby Sanabria (born June 2, 1957) is an American drummer, percussionist, composer, arranger, documentary film producer, educator, activist, radio show host, and writer of Puerto Rican descent who specializes in jazz and Latin jazz.

concerts.label: Carnegie Kids: My City, My Song with Bobby Sanabria, Brianna Thomas, and Jen Shyu
Carnegie Kids: My City, My Song with Bobby Sanabria, Brianna Thomas, and Jen Shyu

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Blue
about_quotes.evidence: On this most recent recording I called in Bobby Sanabria to lay some tracks.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ray Blue interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 23, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Terri Lyne Carrington
about_quotes.evidence: the people that will be there will be Nnenna Freelon, John Patitucci, Bobby Sanabria and I think Robin Eubanks will get there eventually.
about_quotes.doc_title: Terri Lyne Carrington interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 9, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Palmieri
about_quotes.evidence: like a young man like Sanabria, Bobby Sanabria who put pressure... He was so wonderful in that, and he could speak for himself
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Palmieri — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
